General.Name: Tan Chong International Ltd
General.Description: Tan Chong International Limited, an investment holding company, provides vehicles and related spare parts in Singapore, Taiwan, the People's Republic of China, Japan, Thailand, and internationally. It operates through Motor Vehicle Distribution and Dealership; Heavy Commercial Vehicle and Industrial Equipment Distribution; Property Rentals and Development; Transportation; and Other Operations segments. The company distributes various models of Nissan and Subaru passenger cars; Nissan light commercial vehicles; heavy commercial vehicles and industrial equipment; and various brands of forklift trucks. It also engages in the development and rental of various investment properties; rental of machinery; general cargo business; rental and leasing of equipment; trading of spare parts; auction site operation business; and leasing and sale of motor vehicles, as well as provides vehicle logistics services to vehicles manufacturers, as well as human resource management services to transportation business; and generates and sells electricity through various sources, such as solar power. In addition, the company manufactures vehicle seats; and offers auto leasing, capital and equipment financing, motor vehicle repair and maintenance, commercial loan, hire purchase financing, insurance agency, and workshop services. Tan Chong International Limited was founded in 1957 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Shui On Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
